case_title: KENIA BETETA VS. MITCHELL'S ICE CREAM, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BETETA, KENIA AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL'S ICE CREAM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
